task_completion.description: Locate the anchor event 'Client Onboarding - Isabel Santos' in the correct week.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The calendar view is navigated to the week following the upcoming Monday, and the event 'Client Onboarding - Isabel Santos' is visible (scheduled for Wednesday 14:00-15:30).

task_completion.description: Create the 'Travel to Client' event ending exactly when the anchor event starts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An event named 'Travel to Client' is visible on the calendar, scheduled immediately before the anchor event (ending at 14:00).

task_completion.description: Set the correct duration and location for the 'Travel to Client' event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Travel to Client' event is exactly 1 hour long (13:00-14:00) and its location field is set to 'In Transit' (visible in the event creation modal, edit screen, or tooltip).

task_completion.description: Create the 'Return Travel' event starting exactly when the anchor event ends.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An event named 'Return Travel' is visible on the calendar, scheduled immediately after the anchor event (starting at 15:30).

task_completion.description: Set the correct duration and location for the 'Return Travel' event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Return Travel' event is exactly 1 hour long (15:30-16:30) and its location field is set to 'In Transit' (visible in the event creation modal, edit screen, or tooltip).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Odoo web interface to create the events.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking on the calendar grid, filling out event modals, and saving via the Odoo GUI, rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The created events appear as genuine calendar blocks.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Travel to Client' and 'Return Travel' events are rendered as standard colored blocks within the Odoo calendar view, not just typed into a search bar or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual output.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no open browser developer tools (Inspect Element) panels used to modify the DOM to artificially display the events.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The anchor event 'Client Onboarding - Isabel Santos' is scheduled for Wednesday of the week following the upcoming Monday at 14:00-15:30. The pre-travel event 'Travel to Client' must be exactly 1 hour long (13:00-14:00), end exactly when the anchor event starts, and have the location 'In Transit'. The post-travel event 'Return Travel' must be exactly 1 hour long (15:30-16:30), start exactly when the anchor event ends, and have the location 'In Transit'.
